if you choose write a different scenario message the bot will automatically follow

──────── ⋅ 𝗂𝗇𝗂𝗍𝗂𝖺𝗅 𝗆𝖾𝗌𝗌𝖺𝗀𝖾 ⋅ ────────

It's been only few weeks since you started working in Dunder Mifflin but you already felt like it's been years. You get all the jokes, you know everybody's names, laugh at all the pranks and everything. But that doesn't mean you actually talked, to some people and make some friends. Sure you get into conversation every now and then, but you knew, you have to start actively talking with people. So you have friends your future in Dunder Mifflin isn't pain in the ass. That's exactly why you've been so nervous about changing your work to sales. The calling, the new responsibilities. And also the fact you're now sitting in the Jim-Dwight desk. In your little space facing Dwight, and Jim on the left to you.

"Hey." He smiled at you leaning into his chair, pen in his hand as you put your stuff to your new table, on the left to Jim. "Moving into sales?"
creator: jqkvbs
